prompt: Create a modern government program landing page UI mockup for Indonesia in a clean, professional web design style, desktop widescreen aspect ratio. The page uses a white background with bold red accents, soft rounded corners, subtle gray dividers, and a polished frontend-dribbble presentation look. At the very top, build a horizontal navigation bar with 6 visible elements: the Indonesian Garuda emblem and the text "PEMERINTAH REPUBLIK INDONESIA" on the left, then 4 centered menu items labeled "Program", "Dampak", "Menu", and "Pemantauan", and on the far right a large red rounded button labeled "Program MBG" with a small people icon. Below it, design a hero section split into two columns. On the left, show a small program label line with a red bowl icon, the text "MBG", a vertical divider, and "Makan Bergizi Gratis". Under that, place a large bold headline reading "{argument name="headline text" default="Makan Bergizi, Anak Indonesia Kuat"}" in dark navy, spanning 3 lines. Add a short paragraph in Indonesian below: "Program MBG mendukung gizi harian siswa SD dan SMP melalui menu seimbang, pemantauan sekolah, dan laporan dampak yang transparan." Then place 2 call-to-action buttons side by side: a solid red button labeled "Lihat Dampak" with a right arrow, and an outlined white button with red border labeled "Panduan Sekolah" with a right arrow. On the right side of the hero, place a rounded large photo-style image framed by a sweeping white curved divider and red corner background. The image shows an Indonesian elementary classroom with 5 visible schoolchildren in white uniforms with red ties, seated at desks, warm daylight from windows, shallow depth of field, documentary-photo realism. In the foreground, on a wooden desk, show a stainless steel compartment tray meal with exactly 5 food items: white rice, mixed vegetables, a piece of fried chicken, a banana, and watermelon cubes. Beside the tray, place 1 milk carton labeled "SUSU SEGAR". Under the hero, add a full-width red statistics band with 4 equally spaced metric cards separated by thin vertical dividers. Each card has a white circular icon and bold white text. The 4 metrics are: "245.000+" with label "Sekolah Terlayani", "8,7 Juta+" with label "Siswa Penerima Manfaat", "1,2 Miliar+" with label "Porsi Disalurkan", and "98,6%" with label "Kepuasan Siswa". At the bottom center, add a 3-dot carousel indicator with the left dot active in red and the other 2 dots gray. Include a faint Indonesia map texture in the lower-left background. Use crisp typography, generous whitespace, high-end fintech/government website aesthetics, realistic UI proportions, and a production-ready landing page mockup appearance.
translatedPrompt: 为印尼政府项目创建一个现代化的落地页 UI 模型，采用简洁、专业的网页设计风格，适配桌面宽屏比例。页面背景为白色，搭配醒目的红色点缀、柔和的圆角设计、细腻的灰色分割线，呈现出精致的 Dribbble 前端展示风格。在页面最上方，构建一个水平导航栏，包含 6 个可见元素：左侧为印尼 Garuda 国徽及文字“PEMERINTAH REPUBLIK INDONESIA”，中间为 4 个菜单项，标签分别为“Program”、“Dampak”、“Menu”和“Pemantauan”，最右侧是一个带有小型人物图标的红色大圆角按钮，标签为“Program MBG”。在下方设计一个双栏布局的首屏区域。左侧显示一行小型程序标签，包含一个红色碗状图标、文字“MBG”、一条垂直分割线以及“Makan Bergizi Gratis”。下方放置一个醒目的大标题，内容为“{argument name="headline text" default="Makan Bergizi, Anak Indonesia Kuat"}”，采用深蓝色，跨越 3 行。在下方添加一段印尼语短文：“Program MBG mendukung gizi harian siswa SD dan SMP melalui menu seimbang, pemantauan sekolah, dan laporan dampak yang transparan。”接着并排放置 2 个行动号召按钮：一个带有向右箭头的红色实心按钮，标签为“Lihat Dampak”；以及一个带有红色边框的白色轮廓按钮，标签为“Panduan Sekolah”，同样带有向右箭头。在首屏右侧，放置一张圆角大型照片风格的图片，由弧形白色分割线和红色背景角框定。图片展示了一间印尼小学教室，画面中有 5 名身穿白衣红领带校服的小学生坐在课桌前，窗外透进温暖的日光，景深较浅，具有纪录片式的写实感。在前景的木质课桌上，展示一个不锈钢分格餐盘，内含 5 种食物：白米饭、什锦蔬菜、一块炸鸡、一根香蕉和西瓜块。餐盘旁放置一盒标签为“SUSU SEGAR”的牛奶。在首屏下方，添加一个全宽的红色统计数据栏，包含 4 个等间距的指标卡片，由细垂直线分隔。每个卡片配有一个白色圆形图标和加粗的白色文字。4 个指标分别为：“245.000+”对应标签“Sekolah Terlayani”，“8,7 Juta+”对应标签“Siswa Penerima Manfaat”，“1,2 Miliar+”对应标签“Porsi Disalurkan”，以及“98,6%”对应标签“Kepuasan Siswa”。在底部中心添加一个 3 点式轮播指示器，左侧圆点为红色激活状态，其余 2 个为灰色。在左下角背景中加入淡淡的印尼地图纹理。使用清晰的排版、充裕的留白、高端金融科技/政府网站美学、真实的 UI 比例，打造一个可直接用于生产环境的落地页模型。

breakdown.creativeCore: 印尼学校营养计划落地页：一个为印尼 MBG 学校营养计划设计的精美桌面端网站首屏模型，适用于政府、公民科技或前端设计展示。
breakdown.subject: 界面
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 直播带货界面、社交电商、移动端商品页
breakdown.whySelected: 得分 71；构图: centered, vertical, horizontal；风格: realistic, documentary；要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a UI/界面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, vertical, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, documentary]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
